description_long: This is a modern, rectangular trash bin with a matte black finish and a slightly domed top. The front features a rectangular slot for depositing waste, above which is a small Italian flag sticker and a pictogram of a hand placing trash into the slot. The sides display a white stick-figure icon throwing waste into a bin, and there are sturdy, external handles on both sides for easy maneuvering. The back is plain, with no visible openings or markings. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, suitable for urban environments such as sidewalks or parks.
description: A matte black, rectangular trash bin with a domed top, side handles, and clear waste disposal signage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the waste slot, Italian flag sticker, and pictogram for trash disposal.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a white stick-figure icon and an external handle.
description_view_2: Rear view, plain with no markings or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a matching stick-figure icon and external handle.
attribute_labeling_or_signage: pictogram of hand depositing trash, stick-figure waste icon, Italian flag sticker, and waste type label
